name: io.github.chrischall/ofw-mcp
description: OurFamilyWizard co-parenting for Claude — messages, calendar, expenses, and journal

environmentVariables.name: OFW_USERNAME
environmentVariables.description: Your OurFamilyWizard login email address. Optional — if omitted, the server falls back to the fetchproxy browser extension (requires being signed in to ourfamilywizard.com).

environmentVariables.name: OFW_PASSWORD
environmentVariables.description: Your OurFamilyWizard password. Optional — see OFW_USERNAME.
